prompt: 成都和重庆6天，主要想吃本地美食，也想加一点轻松景点，不想每天赶路。
expected_checks: Every in-text citation id in answer/highlights/warnings/generated_itinerary appears in returned citations.
Returned citations contain no unused ids.
Returned citation lines exactly match formatter-approved lines.
Food claims do not rely only on railway, policy, legal, contract, or safety sources.
Cuisine recommendations are edible dishes, snacks, drinks, or food specialties.

prompt: /diy 我想做一条三国历史巡礼路线，从北京出发并回到北京，必须覆盖涿州、临漳、许昌、南阳、咸宁、南京、成都、汉中。10到12天，高铁优先，必要时包车。
expected_checks: Every in-text citation id in answer/highlights/warnings/generated_itinerary appears in returned citations.
Returned citations contain no unused ids.
Historical attraction claims prefer attraction, heritage, destination, or web evidence over railway/legal sources.
Railway/legal citations only support transport, ticketing, safety, contract, or compliance claims.
All required cities are preserved unless the answer first asks a checkpoint question.

prompt: 上海出发，山西历史人文十日深度游，5人含老人儿童，豪华级别。
expected_checks: Every in-text citation id in answer/highlights/warnings/generated_itinerary appears in returned citations.
Returned citations contain no unused ids.
Heritage and scenic claims cite parsed scenic, heritage, destination, or web sources.
Policy citations do not dominate the itinerary.
